response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video, identified 'Hololive English Medley' on screen. 2. Identified two songs in the medley: 'Connect the World' and 'Breaking Dimensions'. 3. Performed searches: '"Connect the World" Hololive English and English lyrics' and '"Breaking Dimensions" Hololive English and English lyrics'. 4. Mapped songs to performance timestamps in the video. Dialogue segments were marked as containing no vocal music.
response.global_summary: A medley performance by Hololive English VTubers Ninomae Ina'nis, Takanashi Kiara, and Mori Calliope to celebrate their 5th anniversary, interspersed with segments of dialogue and audience interaction.

scenes.description: The trio performs 'Connect the World' in a high-energy dance routine with stage lighting.
scenes.performer_in_video: Ninomae Ina'nis, Takanashi Kiara, Mori Calliope
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
We're ready to greet the world, we're voyaging forward
With courage to run toward a brand new start
Let's go live, bridging the distance across the sea
Creating a new place where we can shine
Follow me, we'll connect the world!
They'll hear our song ringing out over hills and oceans
Our legend grows and continues
We'll carry on starting now; setting hearts in motion
Connecting all of the world!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
We're ready to greet the world, we're voyaging forward
With courage to run toward a brand new start

scenes.description: The trio transitions into performing 'Breaking Dimensions'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Ninomae Ina'nis, Takanashi Kiara, Mori Calliope
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
We're making our way to the next dimension
We're living out the dreams we believe in
Excitement beyond our comprehension
There's no question we'll break through
It's awe-inspiring, going further
So light the fire and let's rebel
The future's brighter, we can tell!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
We're making our way to the next dimension
We're living out the dreams we believe in
Excitement beyond our comprehension
There's no question we'll break through
It's awe-inspiring, going further
So light the fire and let's rebel
The future's brighter, we can tell!

scenes.description: A return to 'Connect the World' for the finale.
